projects.title: Silicon Photonics Integration for Next-Generation Optical Interconnects
projects.description: This project develops novel silicon photonics integration techniques for high-bandwidth optical interconnects targeting data centre and telecommunications applications. The work combines advanced CMOS-compatible fabrication processes with innovative waveguide designs to achieve unprecedented data rates.

projects.title: Wide Bandgap Semiconductor Materials for Power Electronics
projects.description: Research programme investigating gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) based power semiconductor devices for energy-efficient power conversion. The project addresses crystal growth, device fabrication, and reliability testing of next-generation power devices.

projects.title: Atomic Layer Deposition of Functional Thin Films for Sensor Applications
projects.description: Development of novel ALD processes for depositing functional thin film materials with precisely controlled thickness and composition. Applications include gas sensors, biosensors, and optical coatings with enhanced performance characteristics.

projects.title: III-V Semiconductor Nanowire Lasers for Integrated Photonic Circuits
projects.description: This project investigates the growth and characterization of III-V semiconductor nanowire lasers on silicon substrates, targeting monolithic integration with CMOS electronics for on-chip optical communication and sensing applications.
